name: stepper
description: A multi-step progress indicator for wizards, checkouts and onboarding flows, horizontal or vertical. Steps derive completed/active/upcoming state from the root value; the active step carries aria-current. Parts: Stepper (root, value/orientation), StepperItem (step), StepperTrigger, StepperIndicator (number/check), StepperTitle, StepperDescription, StepperSeparator.
